name: open-meteo
description: Get current weather conditions and forecasts for any location on Earth. Returns temperature, wind speed, humidity, precipitation, UV index, and more. Accepts latitude and longitude coordinates. Use for questions like 'what's the weather in Tokyo', 'will it rain tomorrow in Portland', 'current temperature in New York'. Supports hourly and daily forecasts up to 16 days ahead.

input.description: Query parameters as JSON. Required: 'latitude' (number), 'longitude' (number). Optional: 'current' (comma-separated variables like 'temperature_2m,wind_speed_10m,relative_humidity_2m,precipitation,weather_code'), 'daily' (e.g. 'temperature_2m_max,temperature_2m_min,precipitation_sum'), 'hourly' (e.g. 'temperature_2m,precipitation_probability'), 'temperature_unit' ('celsius' or 'fahrenheit', default celsius), 'wind_speed_unit' ('kmh','ms','mph','kn'), 'forecast_days' (1-16), 'timezone' (e.g. 'America/Los_Angeles').

current.description: Comma-separated current weather variables: temperature_2m, relative_humidity_2m, apparent_temperature, precipitation, rain, weather_code, wind_speed_10m, wind_direction_10m, uv_index

daily.description: Comma-separated daily forecast variables: temperature_2m_max, temperature_2m_min, precipitation_sum, precipitation_probability_max, sunrise, sunset, uv_index_max, wind_speed_10m_max

output.description: JSON with latitude, longitude, elevation, timezone, and requested weather data in 'current', 'daily', or 'hourly' objects with corresponding unit objects.
